content: agent1: implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' - adding return_positions param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will only touch encode()/related methods there.

agent1: done. Added 'return_positions: bool = False' kwarg to encode() (after disallowed_special, before -> return type), return type now list[int] | tuple[list[int], list[int]]. Added private helpers _token_offsets()/_token_start_positions() near the Private section (used also by decode_with_offsets). If merging, add your 'transformers' kwarg after mine or vice versa - both are keyword-only so order between them doesn't matter, just keep both after allowed_special/disallowed_special.
